    <item>
      <title>Cavaliers owner Dan Gilbert creates a home-court advantage on the road</title>
      <description>The Cleveland Cavaliers won two road games in Detroit to advance to the Eastern Conference Finals. Their owner made sure the Cavs got to see some friendly faces in the Motor City.</description>
      <pubDate>19 May 2026 00:51:53 -0400</pubDate>

    <item>
      <title>Pistons learned a lesson in tough Game 7 loss to Cavaliers</title>
      <description>The Detroit Pistons had high hopes heading into Game 7 of their Eastern Conference semifinal series against the Cleveland Cavaliers, but things went the other way as the team fell hard, losing 125-94.</description>
      <pubDate>18 May 2026 16:51:37 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/pistons_learned_a_lesson_in_tough_game_7_loss_to_cavaliers/s1_13132_43855313</link>
      <guid>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/pistons_learned_a_lesson_in_tough_game_7_loss_to_cavaliers/s1_13132_43855313</guid>

        <media:credit> Rick Osentoski-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Detroit Pistons guard Cade Cunningham (2) dribbles against Cleveland Cavaliers guard Sam Merrill (5) in the second half during Game 7 of the second round of the 2026 NBA Playoffs at Little Caesars Arena.  </media:title>
      </media:content>
      <category>NBA</category>
      <category>Detroit Pistons</category>
      <category>Cleveland Cavaliers</category>

    <item>
      <title>Shai Gilgeous-Alexander vs. Victor Wembanyama makes for historic WCF</title>
      <description>Expected to be a classic battle between rivals Oklahoma City Thunder and the San Antonio Spurs, the NBA's Western Conference Finals will also be historic, no matter what happens on the court. </description>

    <item>
      <title>James Harden's trade demand pays off with return to conference finals</title>
      <description>Midway through the 2025-26 season, James Harden learned that the Los Angeles Clippers weren't offering him a contract extension and worked his way to the Cleveland Cavaliers. Now he's back in the conference finals for the first time in eight seasons.</description>

    <item>
      <title>Are Pistons still confident in HC J.B. Bickerstaff after playoff exit?</title>
      <description>Head coach J.B. Bickerstaff and the Detroit Pistons are officially out of the postseason after falling to the Cleveland Cavaliers in Game 7 of the Eastern Conference semifinals in Detroit on Sunday, 125-94.</description>

    <item>
      <title>Patrick Ewing gives Knicks advice for Eastern Conference Finals matchup with Cavaliers</title>
      <description>Ewing was asked what he would say if he were given an opportunity to address the Knicks ahead of the matchup versus the Cavaliers. </description>
